info.title: Janitor.Cli
info.description: A powerful CLI tool for refactoring and standardizing .NET repository structures. Janitor automatically categorizes projects, reorganizes them into clean folder hierarchies, updates namespaces, normalizes casing, and creates git standard files.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Janitor - Refactor and standardize C# repository structure

arguments.name: output-path
arguments.description: Path where config file will be created (optional, defaults to .janitorrc.json) [default: .janitorrc.json]

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Show what changes would be made without applying them

arguments.name: repo-path
arguments.description: Path to the repository to analyze [default: .]

arguments.name: repo-path
arguments.description: Path to the repository to organize [default: .]

arguments.name: template-name
arguments.description: Name or key of the template to show

arguments.name: config-path
arguments.description: Path to configuration file to validate

arguments.name: target-repo
arguments.description: Path to restore to (defaults to current directory) [default: .]

commands.name: list
commands.description: List available backups for a repository
